summary: Iteration 10 - RBAC, Procurement, Compliance & Intelligence Backend Testing. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). All new enterprise modules working correctly including RBAC with 9 roles and 28 data classifications, AI³ omniscient query with role-based filtering, procurement intelligence, HACCP compliance engine with 7 templates, supplier network, multi-property management, guest CRM, finance intelligence, and waste tracking.
critical_code_review_comments: rbac.py: Well-implemented RBAC with 9 roles (owner, gm, director, exec_chef, controller, manager, supervisor, staff, vendor) and 5 clearance levels (PUBLIC=0 to TOP_SECRET=4)
rbac.py: 28 data classifications properly mapped to clearance levels covering menu_items to acquisition_plans
rbac.py: AI³ omniscient query correctly gathers all data then filters based on user role clearance - staff sees redacted financial fields, owner sees everything
rbac.py: 10 seeded users with proper role assignments and department access
procurement.py: 3-way matching compares PO vs Invoice vs Receiving with variance detection
procurement.py: Vendor scorecards calculate on-time delivery, price consistency, and overall scores
procurement.py: AP aging correctly buckets invoices into current/30/60/90+ day categories
compliance.py: 7 HACCP templates (receiving, cooling, cooking, holding, sanitation, walkin, allergen) with critical item tracking
compliance.py: Checklist submission calculates pass/fail based on critical item failures
compliance.py: Inspection readiness scoring considers checklist scores, open corrective actions, and temperature alerts
intelligence.py: Supplier network with catalog, price comparison across vendors, and RFQ management
intelligence.py: 3 seeded properties (Grand Palms Resort & Casino, Azure Beach Hotel, Summit Mountain Lodge)
intelligence.py: Guest CRM with VIP levels (standard, silver, gold, platinum, diamond) and dietary tracking
intelligence.py: Finance intelligence provides real-time P&L, food cost trending with alerts, and GL summary with 10 accounts
intelligence.py: Waste tracking categorizes by reason (spoilage, overproduction, prep_waste, expired, contamination)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for guests, catalog items, RFQs, checklists, corrective actions, temperature logs, and waste entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested all new enterprise modules. RBAC has 10 seeded users with different roles and clearance levels. Key test scenarios: usr-staff-001 (clearance 0) cannot access payroll_data or owner_compensation. usr-ctrl-001 (controller, clearance 3) can access payroll_data but not owner_compensation. usr-gm-001 (GM, clearance 3) cannot access owner_compensation (TOP_SECRET level 4). usr-owner-001 (owner, clearance 4) can access everything. AI³ query endpoint filters responses based on role - staff sees redacted financial fields, owner sees all. HACCP has 7 templates with critical item tracking. Procurement has 3-way matching, vendor scorecards, AP aging, budgets, spend analytics. Intelligence module covers supplier network, multi-property (3 properties), guest CRM, finance P&L/GL, and waste tracking.
